3334750.name: ゴキ's ROOM
3334750.description:
This is a game where you must endure the terror of the approaching cockroaches.

Can you survive until the end!?

~Background of the story~

You have been called in as a test subject to a mysterious research facility, and will be forced to endure a terrifying experience. It seems that no one has been able to endure until the end yet...

Features:

1. Just endure the fear of the approaching cockroaches

2. Cockroaches attack in several different patterns. Can you withstand them all? (There are three patterns that occur during one game)

3. Single player. Play with others and compete for the highest score!
developers: 株式会社グッドビジョン
publishers: 株式会社グッドビジョン
